# frameDuration

**Instance Property**

The duration of the frame.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc var frameDuration: CMTime? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The key for this property is [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionProperty/streamFrameDuration].

## Configuring Source Properties

- **activeFormatIndex**: The index of the active format.
- **maxFrameDuration**: The maximum duration of a frame.
